productDisplayName: Basics Men Yellow Slim Fit Shirt
description: CompositionYellow shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar with stitch detailing at the seams, front buttoned placket, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs that have stitch detailing at the seams, mid-sleeve buttoned flaps, patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hemFittingSlimWash careMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not soak or bleachLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron do not iron on print/embroideryCreated from cotton fabric, this yellow shirt from basics' Play collection makes for an easy addition to your wardrobe, offering exemplary comfort. Team it with jeans for an urban style. Add on suede shoes, a blazer or sweater and enjoy the winter with much elan. And simply roll up the sleeves and secure them with the flaps for a summery look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight: 5'11" Shoulders: 17.5"
